rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in component type annexes when they refer to visible ports or features.
Use visible identifiers from the AADL model to define assumptions and guarantees.
generic_rules: Declare boolean range checks using helper equations with named limits.
Ensure type consistency between AGREE expressions and AADL data types.
Avoid referencing AADL properties directly in AGREE expressions.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Component type contracts should not reference implementation-only subcomponent paths.
anti_patterns: Do not generate range assumptions or guarantees without concrete bounds or visible feature names.
Do not reference AADL timing properties like Period or Deadline as AGREE variables.
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and their mapping to AGREE variables
Implementation-level bindings in component type scopes
